top3.sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(ph.Id) AS post_history_count,
    MAX(ph.CreationDate) AS last_edit_date
FROM posts p
JOIN postHistory ph ON p.Id = ph.PostId
WHERE p.Title = 'What is the best introductory Bayesian statistics textbook?';

SELECT COUNT(ph.Id) AS post_history_count, MAX(ph.CreationDate) AS last_edit_date
FROM posts p
JOIN postHistory ph ON p.Id = ph.PostId
WHERE p.Title = 'What is the best introductory Bayesian statistics textbook?'
  AND ph.PostHistoryTypeId IN (2, 5); -- 2 = Initial title, 5 = Title edit

WHERE p.Title = 'What is the best introductory Bayesian statistics textbook?';

  AND ph.PostHistoryTypeId = 5; -- Title edit only

final.sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(ph.Id) AS post_history_count,
    MAX(ph.CreationDate) AS last_edit_date
FROM posts p
JOIN postHistory ph ON p.Id = ph.PostId
WHERE p.Title = 'What is the best introductory Bayesian statistics textbook?';
